title: Verify network error during cancel trial flow
description: Test the system's behavior when a network error occurs while attempting to cancel the trial.
preconditions: User is on the Loss Aversion pop-up for cancelling

steps.description: 1. Turn on airplane mode or disable network
2. Click the 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access' button

expected_result: An appropriate error message is displayed. The trial status remains active. The user can retry once the network is restored.
